children.label: A
children.text: the average rate of assessment refunds provided to producers under State beef promotion, research, and consumer information programs financed through producer assessments, as determined by the Board; or

children.heading: Demand and receipt of one-time refund
children.label: c Demand and receipt of one-time refund

children.text: is responsible for paying such assessment; and
does not support the program established under this chapter.

children.heading: Form and time period for demand for one-time refund
children.label: d Form and time period for demand for one-time refund
children.text: Such demand shall be made in accordance with regulations, on a form, and within a time period prescribed by the Board.

children.heading: Submission of proof for one-time refund
children.label: e Submission of proof for one-time refund

children.text: paid the assessment for which refund is sought; and
did not collect such assessment from another producer, person, or importer.

children.heading: Insufficiency of funds in escrow account; pro­ration of funds among eligible persons
children.label: f Insufficiency of funds in escrow account; pro­ration of funds among eligible persons
A
children.text: continue to place in such account, from assessments collected under , the amount required under subsection (b), until such time as the Board is able to comply with subparagraph (B); andsection 2904 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: provide to all eligible persons the total amount of assessments demanded by all eligible producers.

If the amount in the escrow account required to be established by subsection (a) is not sufficient to refund the total amount of assessments demanded by all eligible persons under this section and the continuation of an order is not approved pursuant to the referendum required under , the Board shall prorate the amount of such refunds among all eligible persons who demand such refund.section 2906(a) of this title
